summary: Iter 55 fully green across all three workstreams. (A) Agency Left-Nav — logged in as agency@booktalent.com, clicked each of the 11 sidebar items (overview/artists/bookings/clients/events/calendar/finance/staff/reports/documents/notifications) — every click produced the exact URL /agency/{module} with non-empty content in [data-testid=agency-content] and ZERO compound paths like /agency/overview/artists. NavLink absolute-to + end prop fix verified. (B) Admin RBAC backend + UI — 18/18 pytest passed covering: GET /admin/rbac/roles returns 15 perms + 6 presets; GET /admin/rbac/me for super admin returns admin_role='super_admin' + 15 perms; POST /admin/admins creates finance admin with the correct 6-perm preset {users.view, bookings.view, payments.view, payments.refund, subscriptions.manage, analytics.view}; GET /admin/admins lists both; duplicate email → 400; PATCH admin_role='viewer' downgrades to the 4-perm viewer preset; DELETE last super admin → 400 blocked; soft-delete of other admins works. Safety guards: PATCH self {active:false} → 400, PATCH self {admin_role:'viewer'} → 400, DELETE self → 400. RBAC enforcement: finance admin can hit /admin/stats (analytics.view=200), blocked on /admin/admins (403) and /admin/artists/{id}/suspend (403). Frontend: /admin → sidebar sb-admins click loads admin-admins-table, super_admin row has NO delete button (business rule ✓). New Admin modal with permission checkboxes disabled unless role='custom' (✓). Create + Edit + Suspend/Reactivate + Delete flows all functional. (C) Artist About endpoint + About tab — GET /api/artists/{priya_id}/about (public, credentials:omit) returns 200 with {universal, category, category_slug='Singer', raw_answers_count:15}. Answer objects have full {id,question,type,answer,section,options} shape. Frontend /artist/{priya_id} About tab shows standard grid plus [data-testid=qa-panel] 'Rider & Preferences' with 10 qa-item cards grouped into qa-section-travel / qa-section-hospitality / qa-section-technical requirements. No media hints appear for Priya (no media-type answers in seed data — expected). (D) Questionnaire Wizard: Priya's questionnaire step 1 renders 5 q-media-hint-{qid} blocks (profile_photo, cover_photo, gallery_images, intro_video, performance_videos), each with the standard 'Upload happens on the Media & Photos tab' text and ZERO <input type=file> elements — as designed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:264-273 ADMIN_ROLE_PRESETS is a hardcoded dict — new roles require a redeploy. Fine for MVP but consider persisting presets in a collection so ops can tune scopes without a code change.

server.py:276-287 admin_has_permission — the legacy fallback (admin_permissions=None → allow all) is a nice safety net for pre-RBAC seed data, but it also masks partial migrations. Consider a boot-time migration that stamps admin_role='super_admin' + full permissions on ALL admin users so this fallback never fires in production.

server.py:2933 duplicate-email guard checks db.users.find_one({email}) — good; but no case-insensitive email index enforced. If someone signs up as 'Foo@x.com' and another as 'foo@x.com' via different code paths, they'd bypass this. Recommend a unique case-insensitive index on users.email.

server.py:2988-2991 promote-to-super_admin path uses require_permission('admins.manage') and re-checks super_admin — belt-and-braces is good. But 'admins.manage' being held by a non-super_admin who could then mint their own super admin is prevented — verified in tests.

server.py:3005-3006 password reset via PATCH — no minimum length check on the new password (schema is Optional[str]). Consider Field(min_length=8) on AdminUpdateBody.password to match the create body's validation intent.
server.py:3020-3023 last-super-admin guard uses count_documents on non-soft-deleted rows — correct pattern.

backend/routes/questionnaire.py:342-410 /artists/{id}/about — public endpoint (no auth). Correctly excludes suspended artists via 404, and uses fuzzy category matching with a sensible alias table. One nit: for an unknown artist_id the endpoint returns 200 with empty universal/category arrays (because `prof or {}` short-circuits) — probably fine but could confuse callers. Consider returning 404 if the profile is truly missing.
frontend/src/pages/agency/AgencyDashboardV2.jsx:27-39 + 100 — absolute /agency/{module} paths + `end` prop fixes NavLink relative resolution under React-Router 7 wildcard route. Solid fix.

frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminAdmins.jsx:283-284 — delete button is hidden when admin_role==='super_admin', matching the business rule. Good UX but the backend still returns 400 on last-super-admin delete, providing defense-in-depth.

frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminAdmins.jsx:41,132-134 — permission checklist is derived from presets[form.admin_role] in real-time; useEffect resets perms when role changes; matches the backend's role-preset resolution. UX is coherent.

frontend/src/pages/ArtistProfile.jsx:698-763 QuestionnairePanel — clean split of media vs non-media answers, section ordering respects a business priority list. Media hint provides an explicit CTA to the Media tab rather than rendering broken photos — good UX. Note MEDIA_TYPES set is more permissive than backend's UNIVERSAL_QUESTIONS 'file' typing — harmless.
frontend/src/components/QuestionnaireWizard.jsx: unified hint for six question types (file/photo/photos/video/videos/media/attachment/image) prevents duplicated uploader UI. Nice DRY.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Agency nav 11/11 items, Admin RBAC UI create/edit/suspend/reactivate/delete + super-admin-delete-hidden guard, Artist About panel + public endpoint, Questionnaire wizard media-hint on 5/5 file questions)

test_credentials: Super Admin: admin@booktalent.com / Admin@123. Agency: agency@booktalent.com / Agency@123. Artist: priya@booktalent.com / Artist@123 (profile verified NOT suspended in DB before testing).
seed_data_creation: Tests created ephemeral admins iter55_finance_*, iter55_del_*, and one UI-created iter55ui_content_*. All cleaned up post-test via `db.users.delete_many({'email': {'$regex': '^iter55'}})`. Verified 0 leftover iter55* rows remain.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 55 fully green. Regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter55_rbac_and_about.py. Run with: `export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) && pytest backend/tests/test_iter55_rbac_and_about.py -v`. Key testids: agency-nav-{overview|artists|bookings|clients|events|calendar|finance|staff|reports|documents|notifications} (agency shell); sb-admins (admin sidebar); admin-admins-table, new-admin-btn, new-admin-modal, new-admin-{email|password|first|last|role}, new-admin-perm-{permission_id}, new-admin-submit, edit-admin-modal, edit-admin-role, edit-admin-submit, admin-row-{id}, edit-admin-{id}, toggle-admin-{id}, delete-admin-{id} (only present for non-super); qa-panel, qa-section-{name}, qa-item-{qid}, qa-media-hint, qa-goto-media on artist profile About tab; q-media-hint-{qid} for six file-like question types in QuestionnaireWizard. Public GET /api/artists/{id}/about returns {universal, category, category_slug, raw_answers_count} without auth. RBAC enforcement points: analytics.view=/admin/stats, admins.manage=/admin/admins, users.suspend=/admin/artists/{id}/suspend, users.view=/admin/users, artists.moderate=/admin/artists/{id}/feature, users.edit=admin_edit_user, users.delete=admin_delete_user.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — iter 55 acceptance criteria fully met.
